profile.name: Vera Sakhno
profile.title: QA Engineer / Test Analyst / Quality Specialist

summary:
Experienced in functional testing of web and mobile applications, requirements analysis, and identifying risks and gaps. Skilled in defining testing strategies aligned with project objectives.

I support teams in delivering products with a predictable level of quality and take a practical, thoughtful approach to testing, tailoring the level of formalization to project goals and maturity.

Testing & Analysis: Perform functional, regression, and exploratory testing
Define test priorities to ensure meaningful coverage of business-critical functionality
Identify, localize, and assess defect severity
Analyze requirements, business logic, user flows and designs
Work with incomplete, ambiguous, or conflicting requirements
Identify product risks and edge cases
Define and adapt testing strategies aligned with project objectives
Establish clear, repeatable, and transparent testing processes
Documentation: Create and maintain checklists, test cases, and test plans
Prepare test execution and defect reports
Build mind maps, test models, traceability matrices, and state/transition diagrams
Select appropriate documentation formalization based on project context

professionalExperience.projects: Comfy, L’Oréal, Puma, Canon, and others | E-commerce
professionalExperience.stack: Web and Mobile (iOS, Android), Magento, Jira, Redmine, Trello, TestLink, DevTools, Postman, Altair, cURL, REST, CLI/SSH, MySQL, GraphQL, Selenium WebDriver (Java / JS), Mockoon, Graylog, Jenkins, Flutter, FileZilla, Figma, Notion, Google Docs/Sheets, Confluence

Project-related: Analyze requirements (business logic, user scenarios, design specifications)
Test web and mobile applications (iOS, Android)
Plan and execute functional, regression, smoke, and exploratory testing
Identify, localize, and document defects
Track and manage defects in task tracking systems (Jira, Redmine, Trello)
Create and maintain test documentation (checklists, test cases, test plans, test execution reports, defect reports)
Test integrations with third-party services (payments, delivery services, warehouses, notifications, etc.)
Perform API testing (REST / GraphQL using Postman, Altair, cURL) and database testing (MySQL)
Analyze logs using CLI tools and Graylog
Collaborate closely with product managers, developers, analysts, and designers
Non-project-related: Conduct interviews for interns and experienced QA specialists
Mentor interns and onboard new team members

Project-related: Contributed to the launch of 10+ new projects (multilingual, teams of 5–25 people, project durations from 2 to 6 months), ensuring the required quality level at release

Developed standardized test documentation templates for the QA department, simplifying project onboarding for new team members and reducing reporting errors through unified documentation requirements (e.g., mandatory test data, screenshots, environment, etc.)

Defined and formalized a testing approach for each project, aligning team and client expectations regarding test scope and format (documentation detail level, test priorities, supported browsers and devices, etc.) and reducing pre-release conflicts

Updated UI automated tests after a major redesign on one project (Selenium WebDriver + Java); on another project, automated critical end-to-end scenarios (Selenium WebDriver + Java / JavaScript), enabling early detection of critical failures, including those related to third-party integrations, and timely communication with stakeholders
Maintained and extended mocks for third-party services (using Mockoon) in the absence of test environments, allowing testing activities to continue without integration-related blockers
Non-project-related: Created a concise Magento platform guide (10 short articles instead of a 2000+ page PDF), reducing onboarding time for new QA engineers from ~100 hours to ~10 hours and significantly decreasing the number of common mistakes and recurring questions

Designed and implemented QA onboarding and training processes, enabling new team members to reach independent productivity faster, reducing onboarding frustration, and increasing overall satisfaction among QA engineers, managers, and development teams through clear expectations, structured workflows, and defined feedback points
Systematized the interview process by creating dozens of test assignments, candidate evaluation forms, and structured interview guidelines for technical interviewers
Conducted 40+ interviews for intern and junior/middle QA positions

professionalExperience.stack: Web, Telegram Bot, ClickUp, DevTools, Postman, REST, CLI/SSH, MySQL, Figma, Miro, Google Docs/Sheets

Project-related: Perform testing of Telegram bot functionality migration to a new web platform during the initial phase
Conduct functional and UI testing based on mockups and design specifications
Evaluate usability and overall user experience
Prepare detailed bug reports and provide improvement recommendations
Participate in designing new service components in collaboration with the lead developer
Identified and refined incomplete user scenarios, reducing the number of stalled features and increasing the practical value of implemented functionality

Created a comprehensive test model of the service (including API methods, entities, and their relationships) based on both implemented and planned functionality, enabling clear visualization of system dependencies and supporting task prioritization and workload distribution among developers

professionalExperience.stack: Web, Trello, DevTools, Postman, CLI/SSH, MySQL, Figma, Miro, Google Docs/Sheets

Project-related: Perform functional and UI testing, including validation against design mockups, and evaluated usability
Report identified issues and provided improvement recommendations
Define and documented user scenarios for three roles: employer, employer representative, and job seeker
Collaborate with the product owner, developers, and designers

Collaborated with the team to define the minimum viable requirements and development priorities, enabling faster validation of the product hypothesis and early prototype delivery to initial loyal users without excessive development effort
Identified critical defects in the job-to-candidate matching calculation logic
Created a structured test checklist and transformed it into a comprehensive test report covering the entire system functionality, clearly highlighting inconsistencies and implementation gaps

professionalExperience.projects: Personal Account Portal for Utility Service Providers
professionalExperience.stack: Web, Trello, DevTools, MySQL, CLI/SSH, Miro, Google Docs/Sheets

Project-related: Test the service (primarily backend, minimal frontend) and assessed release readiness
Prepare detailed bug reports
Perform re-testing after bug fixes
Collaborate directly with developers (no dedicated project manager involved)

Identified and clarified requirement gaps (e.g., media formats and size limitations, mandatory fields), helping balance regulatory compliance, usability for users of different age groups, and product release timelines
Conducted exploratory testing and reported defects, helping ensure a stable release without critical issues, which resulted in positive feedback from early users.

professionalExperience.stack: Service Desk, Redmine, Magento, Google Docs

Project-related: Register and classified incoming support requests
Resolve standard user issues
Escalate complex requests to third-line support
Monitor SLA compliance and response timelines

Created and maintained a knowledge base for the support team, improving request classification accuracy (in line with SLA requirements) and gradually expanding the scope of issues resolved without engineering involvement, reducing third-line escalations by more than 50%
Trained and onboarded three new support specialists, ensuring a smooth transition and uninterrupted team performance

Studied the QA knowledge base, reducing resolution time for support requests; progressively took on simple testing tasks upon request from project managers, helping reduce project team workload and accelerate release cycles

education: Bachelor's degree in industrial and civil engineering, 2011 - 2015
about:
Passionate about software testing and genuinely interested in understanding how systems are designed and why they work the way they do.

I believe it is essential to understand the product’s purpose and assess the real risks affecting its quality.

While familiar with test automation and management processes, I bring the greatest value as a QA Engineer / Test Analyst — connecting requirements, implementation, and real user experience.

I believe automation and complex processes are not justified for every project and should be applied thoughtfully and pragmatically.

Extensive experience in e-commerce, having tested online stores at various stages — from initial launch to continuous releases for active user bases.

Also experienced in early-stage startups, working with ambiguous requirements, hypothesis validation, and tight timelines.

My main values are honesty and accuracy both in work and in life.
workPreferences:
Open to remote contract or freelance opportunities only.

NOT considering projects related to gambling or betting.
